messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a Python script using python-pptx to create a 22-slide corporate strict presentation for pharmaceutical regulators detailing clinical trial data. The output file must be named "pharma_clinical.pptx" and all content should be in English. Use the standard 4:3 Standard slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


PRIMARY_BLUE = hex_to_rgb("1B3A5C")
SECONDARY_TEAL = hex_to_rgb("2E86AB")
ACCENT_GOLD = hex_to_rgb("F4A261")
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("F0F0F0")
WHITE = hex_to_rgb("FFFFFF")
DARK_TEXT = hex_to_rgb("2D2D2D")
MEDIUM_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("8C8C8C")
CARD_BG = hex_to_rgb("FAFBFC")
BORDER_BLUE = hex_to_rgb("1B3A5C")


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor as _RGBColor
    if isinstance(color_hex, _RGBColor):
        rgb_val = color_hex
    else:
        rgb_val = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = rgb_val


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_color=DARK_TEXT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = font_color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=BORDER_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=16, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7), body, font_size=13, font_color=DARK_TEXT)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, section_number):
    num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
    num_shape.fill.solid()
    num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    num_shape.line.color.rgb = WHITE
    num_shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    tf = num_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = str(section_number)
    run.font.size = Pt(18)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), Inches(0.45), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), label_text, font_size=20, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=22):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(7.1), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=10, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, font_color=MEDIUM_GRAY)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(height / 2 - Inches(0.15)), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, font_color=MEDIUM_GRAY)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.4), Inches(1.2), "Clinical Trial Data Report", font_size=44, bold=True, font_color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.7), Inches(8.4), Inches(0.6), "Phase III Randomized Controlled Study — Efficacy and Safety Analysis", font_size=22, font_color=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(4), Inches(0.4), "Prepared for Regulatory Submission", font_size=16, font_color=RGBColor(200, 210, 220))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.9), Inches(4), Inches(0.4), "Document Version: 2.1 | Date: January 2025", font_size=14, font_color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(6), Inches(0.02))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_exec_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Executive Summary", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    kpis = [
        ("Primary Endpoint Met", "p < 0.001\nStatistically Significant"),
        ("Overall Response Rate", "47.3%\nvs 28.1% Placebo"),
        ("Median Progression-Free Survival", "14.2 months\nvs 9.8 months"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.6)
    card_height = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.35)
    start_x = (Inches(10) - (card_width * 3 + gap * 2)) / 2

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = start_x + card_width * i + gap * i
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_03_study_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Study Overview & Objectives"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Study Overview & Objectives", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    objectives = [
        ("Primary Objective", "To evaluate efficacy of investigational drug vs placebo in achieving primary endpoint"),
        ("Secondary Objectives", "Assess overall response rate, progression-free survival, and quality of life outcomes"),
        ("Safety Assessment", "Characterize adverse event profile across all dose levels and treatment arms"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(objectives):
        y = Inches(1.3) + Inches(0.85) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.75), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_patient_demographics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Patient Demographics"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Patient Demographics", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    demographics = [
        ("Total Enrolled", "412 patients (2:1 randomization)"),
        ("Age Range", "18-75 years (Mean: 56.3 ± 12.1)"),
        ("Gender Distribution", "Male: 54% | Female: 46%"),
        ("Race/Ethnicity", "White: 62%, Asian: 22%, Black: 10%, Other: 6%"),
        ("Disease Stage", "Stage III: 38%, Stage IV: 62%"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(demographics):
        y = Inches(1.2) + Inches(0.75) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.65), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_primary_endpoint(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Primary Endpoint — Efficacy Results"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Primary Endpoint — Efficacy Results", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Placebo (n=137)", "Drug 5mg (n=138)", "Drug 10mg (n=137)"]
    chart_data.add_series("Response Rate (%)", (28.1, 42.8, 47.3))
    chart_data.add_series("Median PFS (months)", (9.8, 12.5, 14.2))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.number_format = "0.0"

    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        if "Placebo" in str(series.name):
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("CCCCCC")
        elif "5mg" in str(series.name):
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_TEAL
        else:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.5), "Key Finding", font_size=18, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.7), Inches(3.4), Inches(2.5), "Both dose levels demonstrated statistically significant improvement over placebo (p < 0.001). The 10mg dose showed the highest response rate at 47.3%.", font_size=14, font_color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_secondary_endpoints(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Secondary Endpoints"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Secondary Endpoints", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    endpoints = [
        ("Overall Survival (OS)", "Median OS not reached in treatment arm vs 18.4 months placebo; HR: 0.72 (95% CI: 0.56-0.93); p = 0.012"),
        ("Progression-Free Survival", "PFS improved by 44.9%; median PFS 14.2 vs 9.8 months; HR: 0.55 (p < 0.001)"),
        ("Disease Control Rate", "DCR of 78.6% in treatment arm vs 52.2% placebo (p < 0.001)"),
        ("Duration of Response", "Median DoR: 11.3 months; 1-year response rate: 41.2%"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(endpoints):
        y = Inches(1.2) + Inches(0.85) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.75), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_07_safety_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Safety Profile Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Safety Profile Overview", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    safety_metrics = [
        ("Treatment-Emergent AEs", "78.4% (Drug) vs 52.2% (Placebo)"),
        ("Grade ≥3 AEs", "31.2% (Drug) vs 18.9% (Placebo)"),
        ("Serious Adverse Events", "12.3% (Drug) vs 9.6% (Placebo)"),
        ("AEs Leading to Discontinuation", "5.8% (Drug) vs 2.2% (Placebo)"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(safety_metrics):
        y = Inches(1.3) + Inches(0.75) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(4.2), Inches(0.65), title_text, body_text)

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(safety_metrics):
        y = Inches(1.3) + Inches(0.75) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(5.2), y, Inches(4.2), Inches(0.65), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_08_adverse_events(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Adverse Events by Category"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Adverse Events by Category", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    ae_data = CategoryChartData()
    ae_data.categories = ["Gastrointestinal", "Fatigue", "Nausea", "Headache", "Diarrhea", "Other"]
    ae_data.add_series("Incidence (%)", (34.5, 28.1, 26.7, 18.4, 15.2, 12.8))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.0), ae_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.show_percentage = True
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)

    colors = [SECONDARY_TEAL, ACCENT_GOLD, PRIMARY_BLUE, hex_to_rgb("E8D5B7"), hex_to_rgb("A3C4D9"), MEDIUM_GRAY]
    for i, series in enumerate(plot.series):
        for j, point in enumerate(series.points):
            if j < len(colors):
                point.format.fill.solid()
                point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[j]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.2), Inches(0.5), "Most Common AEs", font_size=18, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(1.9), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.0), "Gastrointestinal events were most frequent (34.5%). Most AEs were Grade 1-2 and manageable with supportive care.", font_size=14, font_color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def slide_09_subgroup_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Subgroup Analysis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Subgroup Analysis", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    subgroups = [
        ("Age < 65 years", "HR: 0.48 (95% CI: 0.31-0.74); p < 0.001"),
        ("Age ≥ 65 years", "HR: 0.62 (95% CI: 0.41-0.94); p = 0.024"),
        ("Male patients", "HR: 0.53 (95% CI: 0.37-0.77); p < 0.001"),
        ("Female patients", "HR: 0.58 (95% CI: 0.40-0.84); p = 0.004"),
        ("Stage III disease", "HR: 0.42 (95% CI: 0.26-0.67); p < 0.001"),
        ("Stage IV disease", "HR: 0.60 (95% CI: 0.43-0.83); p = 0.002"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(subgroups):
        y = Inches(1.2) + Inches(0.75) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.65), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def slide_10_pharmacokinetics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Pharmacokinetic Profile"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Pharmacokinetic Profile", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    pk_data = CategoryChartData()
    pk_data.categories = ["1h", "4h", "8h", "12h", "24h", "48h"]
    pk_data.add_series("5mg (ng/mL)", (12.3, 28.7, 35.2, 29.1, 15.6, 8.2))
    pk_data.add_series("10mg (ng/mL)", (24.8, 56.4, 68.9, 58.3, 31.2, 16.5))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.0), pk_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(3)
        if "5mg" in str(series.name):
            series.format.line.color.rgb = SECONDARY_TEAL
        else:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.5), "PK Summary", font_size=18, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.7), Inches(3.4), Inches(3.0), "Peak plasma concentrations observed at 8 hours post-dose. Linear pharmacokinetics demonstrated across dose levels with acceptable half-life for once-daily dosing.", font_size=14, font_color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def slide_11_dose_response(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Dose-Response Relationship"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Dose-Response Relationship", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    dose_data = CategoryChartData()
    dose_data.categories = ["Placebo", "2.5mg", "5mg", "10mg", "20mg"]
    dose_data.add_series("Efficacy Score", (42.1, 51.3, 62.8, 74.5, 78.2))
    dose_data.add_series("Safety Index", (98.5, 95.2, 89.7, 82.4, 71.8))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.0), dose_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        if "Efficacy" in str(series.name):
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_TEAL
        else:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.3), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.5), "Dose Selection", font_size=18, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.9), Inches(3.4), Inches(3.0), "The 10mg dose provides optimal balance between efficacy and safety. Dose escalation beyond 10mg showed diminishing returns with increased adverse events.", font_size=14, font_color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def slide_12_statistical_methods(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Statistical Methods & Analysis Plan"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Statistical Methods & Analysis Plan", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    methods = [
        ("Primary Analysis", "Cox proportional hazards model for time-to-event endpoints; two-sided log-rank test"),
        ("Secondary Endpoints", "Logistic regression with covariate adjustment; ANCOVA for continuous outcomes"),
        ("Multiplicity Control", "Hierarchical gatekeeping procedure controlling family-wise error rate at 0.05"),
        ("Missing Data", "Multiple imputation by chained equations (MICE) with 20 imputations"),
        ("Interim Analysis", "O'Brien-Fleming spending function; one planned interim analysis at 50% information fraction"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(methods):
        y = Inches(1.2) + Inches(0.85) * i
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.75), title_text, body_text)

    add_footer(slide, 12)


def slide_13_itt_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Intent-to-Treat Population Analysis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Intent-to-Treat Population Analysis", font_size=28, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    itt_data = CategoryChartData()
    itt_data.categories = ["Response Rate", "Median PFS (mo)", "OS HR", "DCR"]
    itt_data.add_series("Drug Arm (n=275)", (45.1, 13.8, 0.61, 76.4))
    itt_data.add_series("Placebo (n=137)", (28.1, 9.8, 1.00, 52.2))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.0), itt_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        if "Drug" in str(series.name):
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_TEAL
        else:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("CCCCCC")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.3), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.5), "ITT Results", font_size=18, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.9), Inches(3.4), Inches(3.0), "ITT analysis confirmed primary endpoint with consistent treatment effect across all efficacy measures. Results robust to sensitivity analyses.", font_size=14, font_color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 13)

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(10)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(7.5)

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_exec_summary(prs)
    slide_03_study_overview(prs)
    slide_04_patient_demographics(prs)
    slide_05_primary_endpoint(prs)
    slide_06_secondary_endpoints(prs)
    slide_07_safety_overview(prs)
    slide_08_adverse_events(prs)
    slide_09_subgroup_analysis(prs)
    slide_10_pharmacokinetics(prs)
    slide_11_dose_response(prs)
    slide_12_statistical_methods(prs)
    slide_13_itt_analysis(prs)
    slide_14_pp_analysis(prs)
    slide_15_missing_data(prs)
    slide_16_interim_analysis(prs)
    slide_17_long_term_followup(prs)
    slide_18_qol_outcomes(prs)
    slide_19_risk_benefit(prs)
    slide_20_regulatory_compliance(prs)
    slide_21_conclusions(prs)
    slide_22_appendix(prs)

    prs.save("pharma_clinical.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
